title: Renode nRF52840 platform definition for LICHEN
description: Create .repl platform file for nRF52840 with LICHEN peripherals. Start from Renode's existing nRF52840 support, add SX126x peripheral. Wire up SPI, GPIOs for radio control (BUSY, DIO1, NSS, RESET).
close_reason: nRF52840 platform with SX1262 on spi2, tested load in Renode
